channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: LA Student Accepted to 65 Colleges, Chooses Columbia
item.description: Lamont Newell, a 17-year-old student, received acceptance letters from 65 colleges and over $1 million in scholarships.

item.title: Redistricting Changes Cause Voter Concerns, Election Challenges
Pediatricians recommend regular recess for children's health
Reality series featuring Transportation Secretary faces criticism
item.description: Secretary Sean Duffy and his family are featured in a new YouTube series, "The Great American Road Trip."
